creator: vladimir.chukharev@gmail.com
text:
I have a similar problem though without 'FATAL: kernel too old'.

 $ uname -a
FreeBSD vovaasus 10.3-STABLE FreeBSD 10.3-STABLE #12 r297588: Thu Apr  7 14:25:28 EEST 2016     root@vovaasus:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
 $ pkg info -x geogebra
geogebra-5.0.226.0
 $ geogebra 
expr: syntax error
/usr/local/share/geogebra/geogebra/geogebra: line 349: [: -ne: unary operator expected
expr: syntax error
/usr/local/share/geogebra/geogebra/geogebra: line 369: [: -ne: unary operator expected
expr: syntax error
/usr/local/share/geogebra/geogebra/geogebra: line 372: [: -ne: unary operator expected
expr: syntax error
/usr/local/share/geogebra/geogebra/geogebra: line 375: [: -ne: unary operator expected
expr: syntax error
/usr/local/share/geogebra/geogebra/geogebra: line 378: [: -ne: unary operator expected
expr: syntax error
/usr/local/share/geogebra/geogebra/geogebra: line 381: [: -ne: unary operator expected
expr: syntax error
/usr/local/share/geogebra/geogebra/geogebra: line 384: [: -ne: unary operator expected
/usr/local/share/geogebra/jre1.7.0_45-i686/bin/java: error while loading shared libraries: libjli.so: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory
 $ bash --version
GNU bash, version 4.3.42(1)-release (amd64-portbld-freebsd10.2)

 $ sysctl compat.linux.osrelease
compat.linux.osrelease: 2.6.32
